convert.html:
NEXA NATIONS
AI Agents & Automation
Onboarding Summary Report
Confidential  ·  Prepared for: {{8.`1`}} ·  Issued: {{8.`0`}}
01 · Client Information
FULL NAME{{8.`1`}}
BUSINESS TYPE{{8.`3`}}
EMAIL ADDRESS{{8.`2`}}
SERVICE REQUIRED{{8.`4`}}
ONBOARDING DATE{{date}}
EXPECTED DELIVERY7 – 10 Business Days
02 · Welcome Message
{{2.candidates[].content.parts[].text}}
03 · Onboarding Roadmap
01
Discovery Call
A 30-minute call to understand your requirements, business goals, and workflow expectations.
02
Blueprint Design
We design the full automation blueprint and share it with you for review before development begins.
03
Build & Test
Our team builds and rigorously tests the system. Revisions are made until everything runs perfectly.
04
Go Live
The automation is deployed and fully operational. All repetitive tasks now run without manual effort.

mapper.content:
Hi {{8.`1`}},

Welcome to Nexa Nations! Please find your personalised onboarding document attached.

We will be in touch shortly to schedule your Discovery Call.

Best regards,
Nexa Nations Team
